text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Cheered on by a large crowd full of hopeful
spectators, Taiki Shuttle is determined not to
lose.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Beating Silence Suzuka will continue her winning
streak in the G1 sprints, giving her an additional
push toward becoming Umamusume of the Year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus, Taiki Shuttle keeps blazing forward in order
to achieve her dream!
